channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Essential Items and Gadgets for a Smooth Summer Road Trip
item.description: Planning a summer road trip requires more than just filling up your gas tank. Curtis Teegardin from BuzzFeed compiled a practical guide with 33 items to make your journey comfortable, organized, and f...

item.title: Team USA defeats South Africa at the 2026 Nedbank International Polo amid fashion highlights
item.description: The 2026 Nedbank International Polo at the iconic Inanda Club in Sandton saw an intense sporting showdown between South Africa and Team USA. With their head-to-head record tied on South African soil, ...

item.title: Limpopo youth develops free safety app to assist those in danger and speed up emergency response
item.description: A 24-year-old man from Northam in Limpopo Province has created a mobile application aimed at enhancing safety for South Africans facing various challenges. Ontiretse Fortune Ganetsang taught himself t...

item.title: Meghan and Harry Share Rare Photos in Penguin Onesies to Celebrate Anniversary
item.description: To celebrate their eighth wedding anniversary, Meghan Markle and Prince Harry shared a series of previously unseen photos, including a playful image of the couple dressed in matching penguin onesies d...

item.title: The 1969 Subaru 360 Super Deluxe: A Classic Japanese Microcar
item.description: The 1969 Subaru 360 Super Deluxe is remembered as one of the most endearing and unique vehicles in Japanese automotive history. Nicknamed the 'Ladybug' in Japan, it was designed to comply with the 'Ke...

item.title: Trump-backed challenger Ed Gallrein defeats Thomas Massie in Kentucky GOP primary
item.description: In a significant development in Kentucky politics, Rep. Thomas Massie (R-Ky.) was defeated in the Republican primary by Ed Gallrein, a farmer and former Navy SEAL, who received the endorsement of form...

item.title: Sars introduces mandatory declaration for foreign-registered vehicles at borders
item.description: From 1 June 2026, the South African Revenue Service (Sars) will require all travellers entering or leaving the country with foreign-registered vehicles to declare them via the Traveller Management Sys...

item.title: Visayas power grid experiences another yellow alert due to low reserves
item.description: The Visayas region experienced another yellow alert due to high electricity demand and shutdowns in large coal-powered plants, according to the National Grid Corp. of the Philippines (NGCP). The alert...

item.title: Tanzania Health Budget Display Sparks Debate on Luxury vs Public Needs
item.description: In Tanzania, a controversy erupted when the health minister displayed the national health budget inside a Louis Vuitton bag worth over Sh13 million. Many citizens see this as a symbol of misplaced pri...

item.title: Labour MPs Push for National Review of UK's Electoral System
item.description: More than sixty Labour MPs have urged a review of the United Kingdom's first-past-the-post voting system, calling it 'broken' and advocating for a fairer approach to electing Members of Parliament. Th...

item.title: Trump signals potential US military action as Iran seeks peace deal
item.description: US President Donald Trump has indicated that the United States may strike Iran again, after claiming he held off a planned assault in hopes of reaching a peace agreement. Speaking from the White House...

item.title: Former Defence Secretary Grant Shapps resigns from Cambridge Aerospace over ethics concerns
item.description: Sir Grant Shapps, the former Conservative Defence Secretary, resigned from his role as chairman of Cambridge Aerospace on 30 April following concerns about his adherence to the rules governing post-mi...

item.title: Patsy Kelly: Celebrating the Life and Legacy of a Golden Age Comedy Star
item.description: Patsy Kelly was a standout figure in American comedy during the 1930s and 1940s, known for her sharp wit, lively personality, and 'tough girl' persona. Starting her career in vaudeville, she effortles...

item.title: DSWD distributes P7.3 billion in financial aid to over 1.4 million public transport drivers
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has released more than P7.3 billion in cash assistance to over 1.4 million registered public utility vehicle (PUV) drivers nationwide. Assistant...

item.title: Australian and US markets show modest moves amid tech gains and rising bond yields
item.description: Australian shares are expected to open relatively flat, with ASX 200 futures down 27 points or 0.3 per cent to 8612. US markets saw declines in the S&P 500 and Nasdaq, although losses were pared durin...

item.title: Senator Challenges Attorney General on DOJ Fund and Trump Pardon Controversy
item.description: During a tense Senate Appropriations hearing on May 19, 2026, Sen. Chris Van Hollen (D-MD) confronted Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche regarding the Department of Justice's anti-weaponization fund...

item.title: APC clears 36 aspirants for Rivers State House of Assembly primaries, excludes Fubara loyalists
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don finally release the list of 36 aspirants wey dem don clear for Rivers State House of Assembly primary elections wey dey set for Wednesday. Interestingly, none o...

item.title: Understanding the Impact of Social Media on Youth Mental Health and Self-Harm
item.description: In India, with 970 million people online, social media has become an integral tool for emotional regulation, especially among young people. While initially designed to keep people connected, these pla...

item.title: Top Canadian Royalty and Streaming Companies Benefiting from Rising Iron, Gold and Silver Prices
item.description: Iron, gold, and silver prices have seen notable increases in 2026, following strong gains in 2025. Gold has risen roughly 4% year-to-date and over 40% year-over-year, supported by central bank buying,...

item.title: Vanessa Feltz discusses past harassment by Rolf Harris and current MAFS UK sexual assault allegations
item.description: Vanessa Feltz has recounted a disturbing incident from her time on The Big Breakfast, in which she felt Rolf Harris move his hand up her thigh while they filmed on a bed together. Feltz explained that...
